name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:

i think i am getting sick so i make pv comfort bot 🎉 sorry for not doing many requests chat.. ill get to them . One day . after my band auditions are done .. ( monday hopefully )

kinda established relationship btw

side note i think i have some sort of autoimmune condition bc i can not stop getting sick like every other month and every time i get sick it actually feels like im dying anyway

request a bot here > click me !
